title: Introducing Claude Science (now in beta)
summary: Claude Science is a new research app from Anthropic in public beta that automates data analysis and database searches with full reproducibility. It includes pre-configured support for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, and connects to 60+ scientific databases. The app runs locally or on cloud infrastructure and is available across Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.
writeup: Anthropic introduces Claude Science, a research app in public beta that automates data analysis and database searches while preserving full reproducibility. It ships with pre-configured support for genomics, single-cell analysis, proteomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics, and connects to more than 60 scientific databases. The app runs locally or on cloud infrastructure and is available on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.
